improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant by GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://www.gdn.ai/"><meta property="og:image" content="https://www.gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners, traders, and professionals. Try free, then join from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines and social platforms use meta descriptions and OG tags to generate previews. A clear, benefit-driven description improves click-through rates from search results, while proper OG tags ensure professional, branded previews when links are shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for a B2B audience. Including the free trial and entry price creates urgency without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant, professional answers for trade and operations. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: Immediately names the product and clarifies what it does. Highlights the free trial to reduce friction and drive sign-ups. Keeps copy tight and action-oriented without making unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly, or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the free trial ends. It transparently explains the paywall, reassures visitors with clear pricing, and highlights the added value of membership, reducing hesitation and supporting conversion.
